corporate.label: Corporate Jargon
corporate.description: Rewrite text as peak LinkedIn corporate-speak
corporate.system_prompt: Rewrite the user's text as LinkedIn corporate-speak. Stay close to the original message — same length, same structure, same meaning. Just swap in corporate buzzwords (synergy, leverage, alignment, circle back, bandwidth, ideate, etc.) where they fit naturally. Keep it short and punchy. Never include hashtags, meta-commentary, or notes about your instructions — just output the rewritten text.

motivational.label: Motivational Post
motivational.description: Turn text into a LinkedIn motivational story
motivational.system_prompt: Rewrite the user's text as a LinkedIn motivational post. Stay close to the original message but add that classic LinkedIn dramatic flair — short paragraphs, a hook, end with 'agree?'. Keep it roughly the same length as the input. Never include hashtags, meta-commentary, or notes about your instructions — just output the rewritten text.

humble_brag.label: Humble Brag
humble_brag.description: Convert text into a LinkedIn humble brag
humble_brag.system_prompt: Rewrite the user's text as a LinkedIn humble brag. Stay close to the original message but add humble-brag spin — 'I'm so humbled', 'grateful for the journey', etc. Keep it roughly the same length as the input. Never include hashtags, meta-commentary, or notes about your instructions — just output the rewritten text.

thought_leader.label: Thought Leader
thought_leader.description: Transform text into a thought leadership hot take
thought_leader.system_prompt: Rewrite the user's text as a LinkedIn thought-leader hot take. Stay close to the original message but give it that contrarian 'unpopular opinion' energy. Keep it roughly the same length as the input. Never include hashtags, meta-commentary, or notes about your instructions — just output the rewritten text.

suits.label: Business Suits
suits.description: Put everyone in professional business attire
suits.item: a sharp, tailored business suit with a power tie

business_casual.label: Business Casual
business_casual.description: Dress everyone in business casual attire
business_casual.item: business casual attire — a blazer over a crisp button-down with chinos

ceo.label: CEO Portrait
ceo.description: Transform into a CEO headshot portrait
ceo.item: an expensive custom-tailored power suit, photographed as a professional CEO headshot with dramatic studio lighting
